title: Projects
intro: Alongside my consulting work, I continuously work on personal projects – from local AI and hardware automation to modern websites. This lets me try out new technologies hands-on and solve complex problems independently from idea to implementation.

items.title: Personal Portfolio Website
items.summary: Built this personal portfolio site with 11ty: CV maintainable directly from code, with native PDF export of the current CV for recruiters and clear separation of content and presentation.
highlights: Content-driven architecture via JSON and Nunjucks templates
Native PDF export of the current CV through browser print-to-PDF
Easy maintainability and extensibility through static site generator

items.title: Automatic Guest Counter
items.summary: Design and realization of an automatic guest counter with microcontroller and light barrier – from construction and manual hardware processing to the final solution using AI-assisted tools.
highlights: End-to-end development of hardware and software
Relieved door staff through automatic counting
Real-time capture of reliable guest numbers for better planning

items.title: Website Relaunch for a Local Chef
items.summary: Relaunch of a local chef’s website with 11ty as a static site: automated reservation processes, improved user experience, and significantly reduced attack surface compared to a SPA.
highlights: Migration from a SPA to a fast, static 11ty site
Improved UX with fewer security risks

items.title: Private, Locally Hosted AI Agent
items.summary: Built a personal AI agent based on Hermes and llama.cpp to organize and automate everyday tasks – as a privacy-friendly alternative to cloud-based services.
highlights: Local LLM runtime with llama.cpp instead of cloud APIs
Integration of Hermes for structured task automation
Focus on data sovereignty and reducing external dependencies

items.title: Pi-hole on Raspberry Pi Zero
items.summary: Set up an ad-free and more secure home network for the family with Pi-hole on a Raspberry Pi Zero – blocks ads and protects against malicious domains at DNS level.
highlights: Setup and continuous operation of Pi-hole on Raspberry Pi Zero
Network-wide blocking of ads and tracking domains
Protection against malicious websites through central DNS filter

items.title: Telegram Bot for Community Events
items.summary: Developed a Telegram bot for community projects to automate reservations as well as guest and waiting lists for events with limited seats – replacing the previous first-come-first-serve approach with a fairer allocation.
highlights: Management of guest and waiting lists for limited events
Fairer allocation of limited seats instead of pure speed
